name: sap-cloud-sdk-ai-python
description: Integrates the SAP Cloud SDK for AI for Python (sap-ai-sdk-gen, formerly generative-ai-hub-sdk) into Python applications. Use when building Python apps with SAP AI Core, Generative AI Hub, or the Orchestration Service: chat completion, embeddings, streaming, LangChain integration, templating, content filtering, data masking, and document grounding. Supports OpenAI GPT models, Llama, Gemini, Amazon Nova, and other foundation models via SAP BTP.

interface.longDescription: Integrates the SAP Cloud SDK for AI for Python (sap-ai-sdk-gen, formerly generative-ai-hub-sdk) into Python applications. Use when building Python apps with SAP AI Core, Generative AI Hub, or the Orchestration Service: chat completion, embeddings, streaming, LangChain integration, templating, content filtering, data masking, and document grounding. Supports OpenAI GPT models, Llama, Gemini, Amazon Nova, and other foundation models via SAP BTP.
defaultPrompt: Use SAP Cloud Sdk AI Python for SAP guidance.
